harness.accumulator_contract: macc_add cases use an explicit accumulator input buffer and a separate output destination
harness.boundary: external C ABI consumer of generated header and object only
harness.tail_lane_contract: runtime n controls active lanes and output tail sentinels are preserved

multiply_accumulate_boundary.authority: provider-derived typed tcrv_rvv multiply-accumulate body/config/runtime facts
multiply_accumulate_boundary.empty_count_behavior: runtime loop skipped; output tail sentinel preserved
multiply_accumulate_boundary.source: typed tcrv_rvv.macc body/config with typed RHS vector load -> math operand-binding facts -> RVV-owned plain MAcc statement plan -> emitted vmacc operands
